nasb.text: “No one shall take a handmill or an upper millstone in pledge, for he would be taking a life in pledge.

esv.text: “No one shall take a mill or an upper millstone in pledge, for that would be taking a life in pledge.

cnv.text: “不可拿人的磨，或是上磨石作抵押，因為這等於拿人的生命作抵押。

ccb.text: “不可拿别人的磨或磨的上盘作抵押品，因为这等于拿他们的生命作抵押。
